<strong>Osilodrostat Phosphate</strong> 目前有 <strong>38 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Osilodrostat Phosphate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Isturisa is indicated for the treatment of endogenous Cushing’s syndrome in adults.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>familial generalized lentiginosis（98.2%）</li>
<li>acromelanosis（98.0%）</li>
<li>congenital multiple café-au-lait macules-increased sister chromatid exchange syndrome（98.0%）</li>
<li>gastrocutaneous syndrome（98.0%）</li>
<li>leukonychia totalis-acanthosis-nigricans-like lesions-abnormal hair syndrome（97.9%）</li>
<li>Moynahan syndrome（97.8%）</li>
<li>rhabdoid tumor（97.8%）</li>
<li>X-linked lymphoproliferative disease due to SH2D1A deficiency（97.7%）</li>
<li>osteopathia striata-pigmentary dermopathy-white forelock syndrome（97.7%）</li>
<li>peripheral nerve schwannoma（97.5%）</li>
<li>schwannoma of twelfth cranial nerve（97.4%）</li>
<li>sympathetic neurilemmoma（97.4%）</li>
<li>microcystic/reticular schwannoma（97.3%）</li>
<li>trigeminal schwannoma（97.3%）</li>
<li>ACTH-dependent Cushing syndrome（97.3%）</li>
<li>A20 haploinsufficiency（97.2%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of adrenal gland（97.1%）</li>
<li>immune dysregulation with inflammatory bowel disease（97.0%）</li>
<li>Steel syndrome（96.8%）</li>
<li>hemophagocytic syndrome associated with an infection（96.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
